chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1240 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of CMA No.5224/2023 3. For hearing of main case 31-10-2023 Mr. Sheeraz Fazal, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ali Akbar Shar, Advocate for Respondent No.5 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the respondent No.5 has placed an order dated 24.10.2023 whereby petitioner Abdul Qadir Bhutto has been put under suspension under the order of Caretaker Chief Minister and at his place Dr. Muhammad Sarwar Arain has been transferred and posted as Medical Superintendent KMC Civil Hospital Khairpur. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that after suspension of the petitioner, this petition has become infructuous and he does not press the same. Accordingly this petition is dismissed as not pressed in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
